entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Major oilseed and food crop cultivated primarily in semi-arid tropic regions

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPIC REGIONS
entities.description: Regions where approximately 90% of total groundnut is cultivated

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The main threat to the yield and quality of groundnut produce

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the groundnut crop

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The standard and nutrient levels of the groundnut produce

entities.name: RISING CO2 LEVELS
entities.description: A climate change factor that hampers groundnut physiology and yield

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: A climate change factor that hampers groundnut physiology and yield

entities.name: HUMIDITY
entities.description: A climate change factor that hampers groundnut physiology and yield

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A climate change factor that hampers groundnut physiology and yield

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: A climate change factor that hampers groundnut physiology and yield

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGY
entities.description: The biological functions of the groundnut plant affected by climate change

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to resist diseases, affected by climate change

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The reproductive capacity of groundnut, affected by climate change

entities.name: SEED NUTRIENT LEVELS
entities.description: The nutritional content of groundnut seeds, affected by climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART VARIETIES
entities.description: Groundnut varieties developed with stable genetic improvements to withstand climate change

entities.name: MODERN GENOMICS TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to improve understanding and breeding for climate-smart traits

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to withstand water scarcity

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to withstand high temperatures

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by living organisms, including various diseases

entities.name: FOLIAR DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases affecting the foliage of the groundnut plant

entities.name: STEM ROT
entities.description: A disease causing decay of the groundnut stem

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A specific disease affecting the buds of the groundnut plant

entities.name: PREHARVEST AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Contamination of groundnuts by aflatoxins before harvest

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A promising technology for developing climate-smart groundnut varieties

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A promising technology for developing climate-smart groundnut varieties

entities.name: SYSTEM MODELING
entities.description: An approach to understand and characterize target ecologies for devising improvement strategies

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Traditional methods of crop improvement

entities.name: SYSTEM BIOLOGY ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach combining conventional techniques, genomics, and system modeling
